purpose: Single source of truth for external capabilities every world run must use. init-run snapshots this file into the run dir as capabilities.json. Gates cross-check decisions against these entries so runs cannot quietly fall back to ad hoc tools.

englishExpressionSpace.use: All translation or polishing of visible copy. Default is direct English authoring; any translation pass must leave a cache file whose meta.spaceId matches this entry.

styleSpace.use: World-level style ASSET LIBRARY (colleague-maintained, 32 styles, exemplar thumbs, prompts). Upstream read-only source for styleSelectionSpace; style_decision.json selectedStyle must come from style_space or approved_style_library.

fandomCli.use: Source discovery, category-tree traversal and reference-image recovery. Not optional. Cloudflare blocks direct api.php from Cohub sandboxes; from a sandbox use r.jina.ai transport instead.

importSamples.use: Known-good narrating-import package shapes. Consult before writing any new import builder; never guess the schema.
importSamples.shapeNotes: narrating import consumes sections[].atoms, not a root-level atom table. Atom ids are generated by the importer.

studioAuth.use: Studio world create and provision need owner auth. Local shared Chrome owner session is the default; a sandbox needs an exported STUDIO_COOKIE plus browser-like user agent.
studioAuth.localDefault: shared Chrome owner session via CDP

externalTaskPolicy.use: Any batch task that calls external endpoints (reference-image recovery, translation batches, cover generation polling).
rules: per-item timeout with skip-and-record, never let one slow item block the batch
run long batches in the background, poll state instead of foreground-waiting
record skipped items in a repair list and close them before the stage gate, or document them as known gaps

proposalSpace.use: Phase-one research and ip_proposal.md drafting: cast scoping, cross-verified references, fan red lines, delight plan, style candidate shortlist. Output goes to the run dir; the user approves. Method sources: domain KB1/KB2.

acceptanceSpace.use: Clean-context adversarial verification: style_audit, factuality_audit, final_acceptance_audit and delivery reports. verifierSessionId in audit files should be a session of THIS space. Hard verdicts remain with the git gate script; this space audits, it does not adjudicate.

domainKnowledgeSpace.use: World-domain knowledge base (KB v2): KB1 canon extraction, KB2 review counter-example library (CE-XXX), KB3 style audition protocol, KB4 from-scratch worldbuilding. Proposal and acceptance spaces consume these; new failure modes found in acceptance feed back into KB2.

styleSelectionSpace.use: Style comparison and audition against the run's reference pack; 3-5 candidates with IP-grounded reasons and risks; user decides. Reads the Studio_ArtStyle library (styleSpace) upstream, read-only — never copies or modifies it. Method: KB3 audition protocol.

characterCraftSpace.use: Character card writing at cast scale: six-section dossiers, trait dimensionalization via the character-traits skill (bundled in the space under skills/), batch workers with a shared exemplar to prevent drift. Facts trace to source; red lines double-checked.

worldGeographySpace.use: Location cards with relative-position anchors and board zoning proposals (reading path, canonical-geography mirroring). Outputs location card batches and manifests/board_zoning_proposal.md to the run dir.
